eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 7:45 AM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 3:45 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Show Low, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Show Low Police Department is looking for 75-year-old Ruth Lindhorst. She is described as a white female, five feet three inches tall, 161 pounds with gray hair and blue eyes. Ruth was last seen on Friday, June 26th, 2026, at 7:30 P.M. in the area of South Clark Road and Deuce of Clubs Avenue driving a white 2009 Honda Civic two door coupe with California license plate of 6HUR796. Ruth was last seen wearing a gray tee-shirt and blue jeans. Ruth should be traveling with her black and white pit bull. 

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
